visual_description: A curly‑haired woman in a dark sweater sits across from a man in a plaid sweater at a diner table with plates of food. She leans back, then leans forward and shakes her head vigorously, causing her hair to fly around. The man watches her with his arms crossed while other diners and kitchen staff are visible in the background.
audio_description: Background chatter and kitchen noises are audible, with no clear speech from the main characters.
